---
nimi-suli: kalama musi pi soweli ko
jan-pali: jan Alonola
tags:
  - musi
---

soweli mi li lon ilo kalama  
kalama pona li kama tan ona la  
mi kute e kalama musi ni  
mi nimi e kalama lili ni

kalama nja, kalama mu  
kalama wa, kalama o

mi kute e kalama pi soweli ko

 ![][image1]

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
